basics.name: Jingyi Tian
basics.label: Assistant Professor of Business Analytics
basics.summary: Assistant Professor of Business Analytics at the Paul and Virginia Engler College of Business, West Texas A&M University. Research on AI/ML in business operations, digital platforms, and data-driven decision-making.

work.name: Paul and Virginia Engler College of Business, West Texas A&M University
work.summary: Research and teaching in business analytics, information systems, and operations management. Courses taught span data analytics, data mining, and information visualization at the undergraduate and graduate levels.

work.name: Bauer Human-Centered AI Institute, University of Houston
work.summary: Research on applied AI/ML in business processes under the supervision of Prof. Meng Li, focusing on data-driven analytical studies of digital platforms and supply chain management.

education.summary: Advisors: Jonathan Libgober, Guofu Tan & Afshin Nikzad

projects.name: Algorithmic Bidding in Procurement Auctions
projects.summary: With Meng Li & Saunak Kumar Panda. Submitted to Management Science. Invited talks at POMS (2024, 2025) and INFORMS Annual Meeting (2024, 2025).

projects.name: Imitative Entry and Product Loyalty
projects.summary: With Meng Li. Revision requested at Production and Operations Management.

projects.name: Trading off Qualities for Quantities in Matching for Bargaining
projects.summary: Accepted to Boston University Platform Strategy Research Symposium (Long talk), 2024. To be submitted soon.

projects.name: Forecasting Resale Market Dynamics with Machine Learning: Evidence from StockX
projects.summary: With Jialiang Yang & Joshua Li. Under review at IEEE Transactions on Engineering Management.

awards.title: HKU Foundation Scholarship for Outstanding Mainland Student
